blocks.text: Match preview: Sweden face Portugal in 3rd T20I (T20) on Thu, 2 Jul, 2026, 1:30 pm at Botkyrka Cricket Center Stockholm. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 24°C / Low 15°C · Rain: 0.1 mm · Wind: up to 22 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
